participants.name: Emails between Peter Mandelson and Matthew Collins

text:
National Security Adviser, CO) Mungo Woodifield (Minister Counsellor for Trade and

Global Issues, FCDO) and others

From: Mungo Woodifield < Personal

To: Peter Mandelson < Personal "Matthew Collins (Cabinet
Office)" < Personal

Subject: Re: tech partnership

OFFICIAL

Not sure. Hopefully only former.

His office just replied saying there were pleased that these conversations were taking place.
Mungo

Mungo Woodifield

Minister Counsellor, Trade and Global Issues
British Embassy Washington

Personal
OFFICIAL
From: Peter Mandelson < Personal
Sent: Thursday, March 20, 2025 12:20 PM
To: Mungo Woodifield < Personal Matthew Collins (Cabinet Office)
z Personal

Subject: Re: tech partnership

OFFICIAL

Get Outlook for iOS

OFFICIAL

From: Matthew Collins < Personal
Sent: Thursday, March 20, 2025 8:38:31 AM

To: Mungo Woodifield < Personal
Cc: Peter Mandelson < Personal

Subject: Re: tech partnership
Thanks Mungo.
That looks the right approach to me.

Matt

Matt Collins

On Thu, 20 Mar 2025 at 06:34, Peter Mandelson 
> wrote:
OFFICIAL
I think BEW might also play some part, including the Ambassador
Get Outlook for iOS
OFFICIAL
________________________________
From: Matthew Collins 
Sent: Wednesday, March 19, 2025 11:31:26 PM
To: Peter Mandelson 
Cc: Mungo Woodifield 
; Mian, 
Emran (DSIT) 
; Rhys Bowen 
Subject: Re: tech partnership
Starter for 10. A joint centre  / DSIT (myself and Emran) led team with subject matter experts mostly from 
DSIT on the core elements. Would be headed politically by DSIT SOS. Im having a discussion with MoD 
about how they feature more heavily as per your letter.
Matt
 
Matt Collins
Deputy National Security Adviser Intelligence, Defence and Security
70 Whitehall, London, SW1A 2AS
PS: 
 
APS: JCS
JCS

Diary: 
On Thu, 20 Mar 2025 at 05:21, Peter Mandelson 
 wrote:
OFFICIAL
I want to focus on the arrangements we create inside HMG to take this forward. I anticipate discussing 
with Peter Kyle tomorrow evening before we part in California.
What are your thoughts ?
Get Outlook for iOS
OFFICIAL
________________________________
From: Matthew Collins 
Sent: Tuesday, March 18, 2025 11:13:51 PM
To: Peter Mandelson
Cc: Mungo Woodifield
 Mian, 
Emran (DSIT) 
; Rhys Bowen 
Subject: Re: tech partnership
That's good news. Emran and I touched on how we organise ourselves to take this forward at the back 
end of last week. We stand ready to get the right people over as soon as possible.
Matt
